name: errorbruh
description: ErrorBruh makes your coding experience more emotional and hilarious by playing meme-worthy sounds whenever your code fails, crashes, or throws errors. Turn boring error messages into entertaining moments with iconic reactions like the viral FAAH sound.

enumDescriptions: Hey Maa Mataji — pray for your code
Nonsense! — compiler lost respect for you
errorSounds.terminalSoundChoice.description: Choose the sound to play in the terminal when an error occurs.

enum: Voicy_Haan maloom hai tere baap ko mat sikha chal.mp3
enumDescriptions: Hey Maa Mataji 🙏 God cannot save this code
Padhaai likhaai me dhyan do 📚 Skill issue detected
Mat sikha chal 😤 Compiler got offended
errorSounds.ideSoundChoice.description: Choose the sound to play in the debug console when an error occurs.
